ab: yakai ku sapasyasilange li ku sya Usau, wasavidhi kahimuhu iluku ku lamanemane ini.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Usau，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Usau, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: lu kibulrubulru, kyasalru ki sapasyasilange ini ku cingpi, sasupisupilra si cyumingi.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: ngivale, ngipusale, ngitulrulu, pakyasalruana iniya makanaelre.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ai, yakai ku ngyalisiya ku kakudhane ini, wasavidhi kisalru sikai saulryulri.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: sabilrilanenga kadruwa ka apya pakisalru iniya makanaelre.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: yakai saavaivai, kunai makanaelre mahedela nai kivaevange.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ikai kaelrelrea, kau Usau apya mubingziyunga, ai, mahimuhu iluku ku wisengce.
ch: 路途中，Usau想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Kacaw wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: la kisalru ki sapasyasilange ini, ai amiya ikai tubalre iniya, makanaelre miyalriya ku kadruwa ka wailuku.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: kau Usau la tubi ki samama. la kalisi myaikai, asi ani kai pakisalru nakuwa makanaelre!
ch: Usau急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Usau burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: ku sapasyasilange lapelaela iniya, amanisa kaisu ngiyaililuku, lu pakisalru musuwa ku lamanema, lakai su saulryulri!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: sa mugaku laadhana, ngwalalakese mugaku kau Usau, la saulri demedeme idra kisalru ini ki sapasyasilange ini.
ch: 隔天上學，Usau很早就到學校了，Usau把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Usau arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: sabau laiya kau Usau ki sapasyasilange ini, laiya ikai lu bibilrili aingiyailukungana ku, la kyaseasene ki sapasyasilange ku tapakisalruwa iniya ku lamanema.
ch: Usau向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Usau apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
